original_query: SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 2 * "DEPTNO" AS "f0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY 2 * "DEPTNO") AS "t0" WHERE "DEPT"."DEPTNO" = "t0"."f0")
rewritten_query: SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 2 * "DEPTNO" AS "f0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY 2 * "DEPTNO") AS "t0" WHERE "DEPT"."DEPTNO" = "t0"."f0")

original_query: SELECT "t2"."SAL", "t2"."EXPR1", "t5"."EXPR2", "t9"."EXPR3" FROM (SELECT "SAL", SUM("COMM") AS "EXPR1" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t2" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", AVG("COMM") AS "EXPR2" FROM (SELECT "SAL", "COMM" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL", "COMM") AS "t4" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t5" ON "t2"."SAL" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM "t5"."SAL" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", SUM("SAL") AS "EXPR3" FROM (SELECT "SAL" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t8" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t9" ON "t2"."SAL" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM "t9"."SAL"
rewritten_query: SELECT "t2"."SAL", "t2"."EXPR1", "t5"."EXPR2", "t9"."EXPR3" FROM (SELECT "SAL", SUM("COMM") AS "EXPR1" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t2" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", AVG("COMM") AS "EXPR2" FROM (SELECT "SAL", "COMM" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL", "COMM") AS "t4" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t5" ON "t2"."SAL" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM "t5"."SAL" INNER JOIN (SELECT "SAL", SUM("SAL") AS "EXPR3" FROM (SELECT "SAL" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t8" GROUP BY "SAL") AS "t9" ON "t2"."SAL" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM "t9"."SAL"
